title: acronia pileata
intro: Acronia pileata, also known as the Philippine Acronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acronia pileata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and teas.
